{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of Heaven’s Glory
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of Heaven’s Glory]] does not require practitioners to set aside evil and selfish desires.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of Heaven’s Glory]] is a path that [[Kazan Ma Deret]] does not walk.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
